sentenceTimings.text: In this powerful story, Anna faces great loss.
Her son Ethan dies in an accident, leaving her devastated.
Anna finds Ethan's list and decides to help others.
She creates Ethan's Connection to honor his memory.
This moving story shows how we can find meaning in tragedy and help others through our pain.
Anna never imagined that the worst day of her life would begin with a phone call.
It was a Tuesday morning, and she was at work when her phone rang.
The voice on the other end was calm but urgent.
Her son Ethan, who was eight years old, had been rushed to the hospital.
She dropped everything and ran to her car, her hands shaking so badly she could barely hold the steering wheel.
When a child dies, parents face an impossible question: How do you go on?
Some people never find an answer.
Others discover that helping others can transform grief into purpose, creating meaning from loss and honoring the memory of those they loved.
